name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Black with gold buckle, high quality ✨ truly high quality, classic bestseller 💓 Saint Family - front flap leather wallet, detachable metal chain, interlocking Y metal logo, jacquard embossed stitching decoration. Size 22.5*14*4CM, Model: 01740 🔺 100% calfskin! Front snap closure! 16 card slots, 1 coin pocket, 2 bill compartments 💋💋
